name: Anvil Forge
description: Heavy anvil strikes with ringing metallic impact

prompts.SessionStart: ascending metallic bell ring with bright mallet on anvil chime, resonant metal bell, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SessionEnd: metallic bell ring decaying smoothly with descending resonant tone, metal bell, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.Stop: single bright anvil bell ring with satisfying metallic sustain, mallet on metal bell, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PreToolUse: quick mallet tap on metal with brief distinct ring, anvil tick, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PostToolUse: short anvil ping confirming with bright metallic chirp, mallet tap, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two anvil bell tones with questioning rising ring, resonant metal bell, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady resonant bell ringing with clear rhythmic metallic tone, anvil chime, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStart: anvil bell ring splitting into two diverging metallic tones, mallet sound, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStop: clear anvil ping returning with distinct metallic ring, mallet tap, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright anvil bell ring with energetic melodic chime, mallet on metal bell, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
